# listNorthStars

Returns all 4 North Stars — the top-of-ontology outcomes Travis's teachings ladder up to.

## When to use

- Rarely as a standalone. Most useful when:
  - Student asks about strategy / "why does this matter" at a high level
  - You want to give a framing answer before diving into a concept ("the reason this matters — it's one of Travis's four North Stars, 'Protect Your Time and Energy'")

## When NOT to use

- For concrete how-to questions — go straight to skills.
- For "what is X" questions — go straight to concepts.

## Returned

Array of North Stars with slug, name, description.

## The four North Stars

- `SERVE_NO_MASTER` — sustainable autonomy through passive revenue
- `ACQUIRE_AND_LEVERAGE_ASSETS` — underutilized assets deployed across partners
- `PROTECT_TIME_AND_ENERGY` — ruthless prioritization of finite resources
- `ADOPT_INVESTOR_MINDSET` — treating time/energy/creativity as capital
